sizing_rule.note: Portfolio optimization using expected returns and standard deviations to determine optimal dollar allocation per security, then convert to shares via floor(Allocation/Price). Based on Vince's optimal f framework; specific optimal_f value and kelly_fraction not disclosed by author.

source_rule_text: Allocate capital across multiple positions based on portfolio optimization using expected returns and standard deviation, then divide allocated dollar amount by security price and round down to nearest whole share.
